data.name: Temptation Loop
data.detailed_description:
What if a failed run was never really a failure?

Temptation Loop blends incremental progression, roguelike replayability, and visual novel storytelling into one escalating loop. Push through runs, unlock permanent upgrades, and make choices that reshape the story around you. Every attempt gives you something new: more power, more information, or a new path entirely.

The game is built around momentum. Improve your build. Learn the characters. Open new branches. Reach scenes and endings you could not access before. The better you understand both the systems and the story, the deeper you can go.

This is a game about optimization, repetition, and consequence. Chase stronger runs, uncover hidden routes, and decide which choices are worth living with.

Features:

  • Incremental progression that carries momentum from run to run

  • Roguelike structure built for experimentation and replayability

  • Visual novel storytelling with route-based choices and multiple endings

  • Systems and narrative that feed into each other

  • Discoverable scenes, routes, and outcomes tied to how you play

data.short_description: Fight, fail, grow, and talk your way through a branching story in this hybrid incremental roguelike and visual novel.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows 7 / 8 / 10
  • 處理器: Dual Core processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Onboard
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
